title: peripteris
intro: Peripteris is a type of plant that belongs to the family of Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. It is also known as Peripteris or Peripteris arguta, a plant native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The medicinal properties of Peripteris include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to harness its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health.
